items.title: Smart Campus Navigator
items.description:
A smart university platform that helps students navigate campus buildings, find services, discover events, and access academic resources through a modern web and mobile experience.

The project includes interactive maps, service directories, event notifications, and personalized student recommendations.

Students will collaborate in teams to design, implement, test, and deploy the solution using modern software engineering practices.
